I stated recently and don't have almost anyone, so i can give you the poor man option, ultra team whit Tinct and Erica core, the point is to stack a lot of temporary power and go apeshit on ultra turn, put the Tinct weel on her and the one that give you an extra strike, plus the covenant that spawn one every other turn, then build Erica like a dps, can do Sorel weel too, the core of the strategy is to fill all the ultra space whit Tinct strike and one Erica overload, you have to Rouse Erica (core) and Tinct if you can, then in the ultra turn you exalt Tinct, use posse and other stuff to buff you, use Erica exalt for vulnerable, whit Sorel weel you have already staked power 4 time, and the overload get fuckton of temporary power and use Tinct strike that do triple damage 4+ times, probably more whit crit, the random bonus effect and other shit that you can put in that turn.

content: Why simulate when you can experience it yourself?
By doing nothing
It takes alot to do nothing
Just bed rot
Ez

Is that what kids are calling it. Longest I've spent was one time in college, with 2-3 days btw classes. I was reading a webnovel I think something about a guy who was the Demon of Sloth and OP as he gets more powerful the lazier he was. I read that in bed for 2 days straight.
People say nothing is impossible, but i do nothing everyday
https://www.novelupdates.com/series/the-lazy-king/

embeds.title: The Lazy King
embeds.description:
By the time I realized it, I had reincarnated into another world.

I kept sleeping, and at some point I became a Demon Lord.

Even though I never wished for it.

But for me to not have to work, this world is the best. It must be true that good things happen to good people.

The flavor of Sloth is as
